title: alchemilla alpestris var. montana
intro: Alchemilla alpestris var. montana, also known as the mountain lady's mantle, is a variety of the alpine lady's mantle plant, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Alchemilla alpestris var. montana can be prepared as a salve, ointment, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin health and soothe minor injuries.
